Don’t pitch a $20 water bottle. Pitch why it matters. If you list features, you sound like everyone else. If you connect the feature to what I care about, now you have my attention. Pitch isn’t about what it is. It’s about what it does for you. When you master that shift, you stop explaining… and you start enrolling. Want to learn how to pitch like this?
